items.name: Bloodfeud Blade
items.lore: Forged in endless clan blood feuds
items.basicAbility: Vengeful Slash (single-target slash, builds 1 Grudge Mark stack, max 3)
items.signatureAbility: Crimson Reprisal (large AoE slash, heals per enemy hit)

items.lore: Whispers forgotten grudges in the dark
